notes: All non-empty responses share a consistent OCR-error cluster (email domain registradores.org vs printed registrodelapropriedad.org, DNI 2004185C vs 20041185C, entrada 8656 vs 11656, surname Moropos vs Moropsa, street 4-19 vs n°19, applicant email joansnobs vs joansnobc, titular Archas/Arcas vs Archanas) — these are treated as key_misses per the visible-text-misread rule, not hallucinations. The email-domain error is NOT a hallucination because the email line IS visible and the model read it wrong (substituting the website's domain). t0.1 reps are cleanest and most stable; t0.7|rep2 is the only response flagged for a genuine fabrication (hybrid domain 'registralopropiedad.org' matching neither printed value) plus a dropped website line; t0.4|rep2 returned empty. City-name misspellings (Corralajo/Corralleo) appear only at t>=0.4.
